commands.review_summary:
The PR tracks Codex app-server dynamic tool call IDs so their completion bookkeeping does not disarm the short post-tool completion watchdog, and adds a regression test for that path.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence focused reproduction path: a valid dynamic tool request arms the short watchdog on response, then current main disarms it on the tool's item/completed notification before any turn/completed event. I did not run the regression test because this review is read-only.
